ops.body: Track F hard-cut SHIPPED: fusekit 2c0efc7 (hard-cut, −2938 LOC, 4 packages deleted) + ce6a4c0 (darwin-only TestAppSkew), CI green both legs. Refuter pass caught 5 findings pre-ship (release.yml stamping deleted symbols — released holders would never have self-retired; VM stamp ordering; ErrHolderUnavailable wrap off-darwin; vmstress unstamped; doc residue) — all fixed. Wire goldens byte-identical both directions. Drain scope = Track FD (32df2a6). Deleting fusekit release (v2.0.0) tags only after Track P flips are green under go.work.
